name: wuland
description: WULAND browser-playable RPG prototype with Colyseus multiplayer.

scripts.dev: npm --workspace shared run build && concurrently -k -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm run build:client && npm --workspace server run build
scripts.build:server: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace server run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace client run typecheck && npm --workspace shared run typecheck && npm --workspace server run typecheck
